repair.summary: Sequence stages carry one setup and one observable check; fastener panels derive transferable edge-datum schedules, conventional sixteenth-inch dimensions, approach direction, and seated-versus-proud head behavior from the compiled model; completion derives its fastener total from bench-unit membership; the camera favors the active work side; and package regeneration removes orphaned panel images. The birdhouse now uses 11 tightly scoped install panels plus one closeout panel.

evidence.finding_dispositions: 6 of 6 classified product_blocking and repaired before release

reader_review.scope: Every assembly panel and its manifest-backed diagram
minor_repairs: Panel 9 now identifies the extended back's physical top edge instead of a modeled slope datum.
Panel 11 explicitly pairs the left and right cleat offsets with their respective heights.

visual_review.all_instruction_images: 12 of 12 inspected at original resolution; panel 1 shows both the entrance front and receiving fixed side, and every orange target remains visible.
visual_review.manifest_image_closure: All 12 embedded images hash-match their manifest files; no superseded instruction images remain.
visual_review.desktop_mobile_interactive_browser_revie: Not run: browser security policy blocked navigation to the isolated local file URL. Static HTML, original-resolution images, model data, and existing viewer/explode tests were reviewed instead.
